name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We just won another state!
body:
#
We just won again, sisters and brothers - this time in Kansas!
Tonight's victory means the last three states called in this Democratic primary have been won by our political revolution. And we're optimistic that we'll do well in the caucus already underway in Nebraska, and another in Maine tomorrow.
This all sets up for Michigan on Tuesday night, where we're optimistic we can get the number of delegates needed to keep us on track for victory. But that starts with us hitting our critical goal before tomorrow night's debate in Flint.
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign and help us reach 5 million individual contributions before tomorrow night 's debate. We're so close that your donation could be the one that puts us over the top.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/another-victory?refcode=em160305 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/another-victory?refcode=em160305")
When we started this campaign, no one would have ever expected we'd win this caucus. But then Carrie, a self-employed daycare owner from Shawnee, Kansas, joined our campaign the day we announced. A bookkeeper from Wichita added his name and $50 contribution shortly after. A photographer from Overland Park joined the political revolution and chipped in $10 minutes later.
Ten months later, we've earned our sixth victory of the race, far more than anyone would have expected. We're on track to win the Democratic nomination, but it will only happen if we continue to stand together like our supporters in Kansas did today.
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/another-victory?refcode=em160305 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/another-victory?refcode=em160305")
Never in my wildest dreams would I have ever imagined that we'd receive over 5 million individual contributions to our campaign. I am humbled and thankful for your support.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/another-victory?refcode=em160305 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/another-victory?refcode=em160305")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Team Marco
subject: BREAKING NEWS: NEW POLL IN FL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498700:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r)
---
| | | | Peter, **A new poll was just released in Florida that is shaking up the race -- and has Donald Trump worried.** The new survey by one of the nation's most-respected pollsters has Marco trailing Trump by just a few points -- and closing fast! Peter, this is great news -- it's one more sign Marco is the candidate to stop Donald Trump, and win the winner-take-all delegate haul in Florida. But we still have our work cut out for us over the next 10 days before Floridians vote. **In fact, we 've just launched an emergency effort to raise $350,000 before this Monday to reach every Florida voter possible.**
**[Will you chip in $15 or more right now to help us get there?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498700:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r)**
---
| | [EMERGENCY FLORIDA PRIMARY ALERT
Donation Status: PENDING ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498700:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r)
---
| **The time has come for our generation to take the lead in the conservative movement, and stop it from being taken over by a con artist.** Your donation today will send a strong message to the mainstream media that our campaign has the support of thousands of Americans in every state and corner of the United States; and together we are going to take our country back.
**Your support today is pivotal to Marco's success. So as a personal favor, will you stand with him today by making an online contribution?**
---
| | [EMERGENCY FLORIDA PRIMARY ALERT
Donation Status: PENDING ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498700:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r)
---
| Peter, winning Florida on March 15th is critical to our success. [**We can win and defeat Donald Trump but only if we have your immediate support.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498700:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r) All eyes are on our campaign and the support we have. You see, Peter, the attacks on Marco -- both from the Democrats and from Hillary -- are growing, but it's only making our campaign, and Marco's resolve, stronger. **[Your financial contribution today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498700:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r)** will ensure we are able to fuel our campaign with all the resources that we need, and even more important, it lets Marco know you're with him. I hope Marco has your support as he continues our journey toward a New American Century. Team Marco
P.S. This poll reinforces what we are seeing on the ground in Florida: The momentum around our campaign is increasing right when we need it to. We've set a goal to raise $350,000 before midnight tomorrow. [**No matter the size you are able to contribute it will make a difference and make us that much closer to ensuring we are victorious in Florida on March 15th.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498701:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r)
---
| | [EMERGENCY FLORIDA PRIMARY ALERT
Donation Status: PENDING ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46498700:Jsw7ASrNu:m:1:1349778030:24A73E52220F78A7EF86C3C0C469DDB0:r)
---

name: BREAKING@katiemcginty.com
subject: FIRST ad buy in PA Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5875435980126683136/-4633056126424842240?refcode=e20160306&refcode2=e20160306nd&amount=25)
---
Friend --

This race is heating up. A group with ties to Karl Rove just went up with a **$1 MILLION ad buy** supporting Pat Toomey. And that's on top of ads Toomey has already run attacking Katie. **We need to break through the noise right now and respond with an ad of our own.**

**We need to raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours in order to wire funds and get our FIRST TV ad buy of this campaign.**

[**This is a HUGE milestone for our race: RUSH $5 or whatever you can now and help get Katie 's positive message out to voters. But hurry! We only have 48 hours before our ad buy deadline.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5875435980126683136/-4633056126424842240?refcode=e20160306&refcode2=e20160306nd&amount=25)

We've turned this race into a dead heat -- but still 60% of Pennsylvania voters haven't decided who they're voting for.

This ad will be the first time we're able to share Katie's positive message across the entire Commonwealth and reach out to voters who don't know about Katie's ground-breaking record.

[**We 're counting on our grassroots supporters to step up now. Pitch in $5 before our deadline to get Katie's first ad on the airwaves for Pennsylvania voters.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5875435980126683136/-4633056126424842240?refcode=e20160306&refcode2=e20160306nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5875435980126683136/-4633056126424842240?refcode=e20160306&refcode2=e20160306nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5875435980126683136/-4705113720462770176).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: tedcruz026@gmail.com
subject: Critical Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
This is a critical moment in our campaign, and I hope you will take the time to read my email. |
---
[Ted Cruz Personal Email -- May Include Privileged Communication](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33993426:W_tJDvCNa:m:1:1104269936:7DE8B5C8B97C9FCDA888EE1E36DEB27B:r)

Friend,

This is a critical moment in our campaign, and I hope you will take the time to read my email.

The results from last night prove that this nomination is down to a **two-person race** \-- me vs. Donald Trump!

With wins in Kansas and Maine -- we continue to gather delegates to win the nomination.

But even more importantly there's this: _**I can beat Hillary Clinton,**_ **AND Donald can't.**

Here are the facts: in the latest, just-released CNN poll, I beat Hillary Clinton! Donald Trump loses to Hillary Clinton by 8 POINTS. And frankly, the more people learn the truth about about Donald Trump the worse he does.

Why? Because Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton agree on many of the most important issues. Just look at this record:

* Donald and Hillary support Hillary-style, government controlled healthcare;
* Donald and Hillary are both longtime backers of partial birth abortion;
* Donald and Hillary both support big bank bailouts;
* Donald and Hillary both supported Obama's so-called "stimulus" boondoggle; and
* Donald and Hillary both enthusiastically embrace eminent domain.

That's why this email is so critical: In order to defeat Hillary Clinton - we MUST defeat Donald Trump.

And that's why I am asking you -- one of my closest and most loyal supporters - to commit right now to defeat Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton by making an URGENT contribution to my campaign today. you redouble your support for me today?

I need your financial support now more than ever.

[**Defeat Donald and Hillary: I will help with $5 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33993427:W_tJDvCNa:m:1:1104269936:7DE8B5C8B97C9FCDA888EE1E36DEB27B:r)

[**Defeat Donald and Hillary: I will help with $35 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33993428:W_tJDvCNa:m:1:1104269936:7DE8B5C8B97C9FCDA888EE1E36DEB27B:r)

[**Defeat Donald and Hillary: I will help with $50 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33993429:W_tJDvCNa:m:1:1104269936:7DE8B5C8B97C9FCDA888EE1E36DEB27B:r)

[**Defeat Donald and Hillary: I will help with $100 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33993430:W_tJDvCNa:m:1:1104269936:7DE8B5C8B97C9FCDA888EE1E36DEB27B:r)

[**Defeat Donald and Hillary: I will help with $500 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33993431:W_tJDvCNa:m:1:1104269936:7DE8B5C8B97C9FCDA888EE1E36DEB27B:r)

[**Defeat Donald and Hillary: I will help with $2700 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33993432:W_tJDvCNa:m:1:1104269936:7DE8B5C8B97C9FCDA888EE1E36DEB27B:r)
Without your help right now, we'll be electing **President Hillary Clinton**. It's just that simple.

You can make a HUGE impact in this campaign and help me win this nomination with an IMMEDIATE contribution -- no matter how small.

There is great strength in numbers.

With Michigan, Mississippi, Florida, North Carolina, Illinois, Ohio, Missouri, and Hawaii all voting next in just NINE days -- I NEED your financial support. That's why I'm turning to you again.

I'm counting on you to help me take on Donald Trump and his billions.

**This is our time!**

Together, we will reignite liberty in America.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: NEWS ALERT: Delegate Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | **Rubio Blows Away Competition in Puerto Rico** **Sunday, March 6** With his victory in the Republican Presidential Primary in Puerto Rico on Sunday, Marco Rubio picked up another 23 delegates. Rubio won every delegate possible in the contest by winning more than 50 percent of the vote, the first Republican candidate to do so in any presidential primary. Over the weekend, Rubio won roughly one in four delegates available. His home state primary of Florida, just ten days down the road, offers the single largest delegate haul of the 2016 primary, with 99 delegates all going to the winner. It's not the number of states won that decides the Republican nominee -- it's the delegates. [**Click here to donate now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46500360:6bd9uSrNJ:m:1:1349778030:B1BA6E88D794E8CC13A656FAA9915F71:r) to help Marco as he continues on the path to 1,237.
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
|
---

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Stand with Elizabeth Warren: Seniors and veterans deserve a raise
disclaimer_text: paid for by closing a loophole that subsidizes excessive CEO pay
body:
---
Dear Activist, Millions of Americans rely on Social Security for most of their income, but this year beneficiaries will not get a cost of living adjustment. Senator Elizabeth Warren has introduced the Seniors and Veterans Emergency Benefits Act (**SAVE Benefits Act**) to give seniors, veterans, people with disabilities and surviving spouses who rely on Social Security a one-time payment of $580 to help make ends meet. It would be paid for by closing a loophole that subsidizes excessive CEO pay. [**Please join CREDO Action in telling Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to allow a Senate vote on the SAVE Benefits Act.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121401MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06) Thanks for all you do! Bob Fertik

| | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121402MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)
---
**[Tell Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell: Seniors and veterans deserve a raise](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121403MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)** _Sign the petition to Sen. Mitch McConnell:_
**"Bring the SAVE Benefits Act to the floor of the United States Senate for a vote."** Add your name: | [ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121404MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)
---
Dear Friend,
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121405MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)
---
Tens of millions of Americans rely on Social Security for a majority of their income, but this year -- for just the fourth time in the history of the program -- beneficiaries didn't receive a cost of living adjustment. Meanwhile, CEO pay has continued to skyrocket.
Sen. Elizabeth Warren has introduced a bill called the Seniors and Veterans Emergency Benefits Act (SAVE Benefits Act)1 that would give seniors, veterans, people with disabilities and surviving spouses who rely on Social Security a one-time payment of $580 to help make ends meet. It would be paid for by closing a loophole that subsidizes excessive CEO pay.
**Next week, Sen. Warren, Sen. Chuck Schumer and progressive groups will be delivering the signatures on this petition to Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. Add your name to the petition now to help build pressure on Sen. McConnell to allow a vote on the bill.**
**[Tell Majority Leader Mitch McConnell: Allow a vote on the SAVE Benefits Act. Click here to sign the petition.](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121406MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)**
In October, the Social Security Administration announced that there would not be an automatic increase in Social Security benefits in 2016, as there is in most years.2 Right now, the average Social Security benefit is less than $15,000 per year -- and many of the tens of millions of Americans who rely on Social Security to get by desperately need a raise.
Meanwhile, CEO pay at the 350 biggest firms in the U.S. now averages more than $16 million per year -- over 1,000 times more than the average Social Security benefit. In 2014, the last year for which data is available, these CEOs saw their pay increase by 3.9 percent. Incredibly, much of this compensation slips through the so-called "performance pay" loophole, which allows corporations to deduct CEO pay from their taxable income as long as it is based on performance.
The SAVE Benefits Act addresses both of these problems at once by providing a one-time $580 Social Security payment that is paid for by eliminating this egregious loophole. **It's a smart bill that will give a much-needed raise to our seniors and veterans instead of wealthy CEOs.**
But Sen. McConnell has so far refused to allow a vote on the SAVE Benefits Act. That's why Sen. Elizabeth Warren, Sen. Schumer and progressive groups are organizing a big petition delivery next week. Add your name to our petition now to make sure it is included in the delivery.
**[Tell Majority Leader Mitch McConnell: Allow a vote on the SAVE Benefits Act. Click here to sign the petition.](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121407MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)**
Thanks for everything you do.
Josh Nelson, Campaign Manager
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121408MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)
Add your name:
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121409MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)
---
1\. To view the text of the SAVE Benefits Act, [click here](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121410MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06).
2\. "[Law Does Not Provide for a Social Security Cost-of-Living Adjustment for 2016](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00121411MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-06)," Social Security Administration, October 15, 2015.

Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace. We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. Please join us at **[Democrats.com](http://democrats.com)**! You are subscriber #10036727 to Democrats.com Activist Alerts.
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L47) if you do not want future messages from CREDO Action.
If you do not want messages from any of our partners [click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=noads).
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L1) to permanently unsubscribe from all Democrats.com lists.
clean_body: Dear Activist, Millions of Americans rely on Social Security for most of their income, but this year beneficiaries will not get a cost of living adjustment. Senator Elizabeth Warren has introduced the Seniors and Veterans Emergency Benefits Act (SAVE Benefits Act) to give seniors, veterans, people with disabilities and surviving spouses who rely on Social Security a one-time payment of $580 to help make ends meet. It would be paid for by closing a loophole that subsidizes excessive CEO pay. Thanks for all you do! Bob Fertik | | Sign the petition to Sen. Mitch McConnell: "Bring the SAVE Benefits Act to the floor of the United States Senate for a vote." Add your name: | Dear Friend, Tens of millions of Americans rely on Social Security for a majority of their income, but this year -- for just the fourth time in the history of the program -- beneficiaries didn't receive a cost of living adjustment. Meanwhile, CEO pay has continued to skyrocket. Sen. Elizabeth Warren has introduced a bill called the Seniors and Veterans Emergency Benefits Act (SAVE Benefits Act)1 that would give seniors, veterans, people with disabilities and surviving spouses who rely on Social Security a one-time payment of $580 to help make ends meet. It would be paid for by closing a loophole that subsidizes excessive CEO pay. Next week, Sen. Warren, Sen. Chuck Schumer and progressive groups will be delivering the signatures on this petition to Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. Add your name to the petition now to help build pressure on Sen. McConnell to allow a vote on the bill. In October, the Social Security Administration announced that there would not be an automatic increase in Social Security benefits in 2016, as there is in most years.2 Right now, the average Social Security benefit is less than $15,000 per year -- and many of the tens of millions of Americans who rely on Social Security to get by desperately need a raise. Meanwhile, CEO pay at the 350 biggest firms in the U.S. now averages more than $16 million per year -- over 1,000 times more than the average Social Security benefit. In 2014, the last year for which data is available, these CEOs saw their pay increase by 3.9 percent. Incredibly, much of this compensation slips through the so-called "performance pay" loophole, which allows corporations to deduct CEO pay from their taxable income as long as it is based on performance. The SAVE Benefits Act addresses both of these problems at once by providing a one-time $580 Social Security payment that is paid for by eliminating this egregious loophole. It's a smart bill that will give a much-needed raise to our seniors and veterans instead of wealthy CEOs. But Sen. McConnell has so far refused to allow a vote on the SAVE Benefits Act. That's why Sen. Elizabeth Warren, Sen. Schumer and progressive groups are organizing a big petition delivery next week. Add your name to our petition now to make sure it is included in the delivery. Thanks for everything you do. Josh Nelson, Campaign Manager Add your name: 1\. To view the text of the SAVE Benefits Act, . 2\. "," Social Security Administration, October 15, 2015. Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace. We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. Please join us at **! name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Five million contributions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Bernie's big announcement won't stop us | Friend --

At tonight’s debate, Bernie Sanders will likely announce that he has received five million individual contributions to his campaign.

Now, we’ve racked up more delegates than he has and we’re doing better in the polls than he is. But that's a lot of contributions -- if his supporters keep stepping up at a higher rate than our team, we’re going to have more contests that look like the ones we saw yesterday in Kansas and Nebraska.

**We're just 5 people away from hitting our goal in your town. Chip in to help reach our goal and to support this campaign right now:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ5MDE4MzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYxMDg2OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Need to hit our goal before the debate
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I have two very important updates for you today.
The first is that **we won Nebraskalast night, in addition to winning Kansas.** That makes seven wins for Bernie, and we have a chance of doing well when Maine caucuses today.
The second is that we are **so very close to hitting our goal of 5 million individual contributions** before tonight's Democratic debate in Flint, Michigan. But we need a few thousand more in order to make it so Bernie can tell the country during tonight's debate.
[**Please make a contribution of $2.70 to Bernie 2016 today so we can reach our goal of 5 million individual contributions before tonight's debate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-nebraska?refcode=em160306full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-nebraska?refcode=em160306full")
Today will be a very big day for our campaign. Thank you for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-nebraska?refcode=em160306full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-nebraska?refcode=em160306full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Katie needs you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3256873172275822592/5743800364990201856?refcode=e20160306.2&refcode2=e20160306.2nd&amount=25)
---
You're busy, I'm sure, so I'll be quick. We're working to hit our big goal for Katie's Media Response Fund. Right now, we're still $13,440 away. When we hit our goal, we'll be able to launch our next round of voter outreach -- **including our first television ad.**

Right now, outside groups have already dropped tons of cash on misleading ads distorting Katie's record. We run the risk of being too late to the game if we don't get Katie's message out to as many Pennsylvania voters as possible right now.

[**Chip in $5 to our Media Response Fund right now. This is crunch time.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3256873172275822592/5743800364990201856?refcode=e20160306.2&refcode2=e20160306.2nd&amount=25)

To win on Primary Day, we need undecided voters to hear directly from Katie. That's what our Media Response Fund will let us do. But only if enough folks step up right now.

Thanks for helping Katie out,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3256873172275822592/5743800364990201856?refcode=e20160306.2&refcode2=e20160306.2nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3256873172275822592/5671742770952273920).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
